params.name: Gan Shi Star Chart
params.description: Gan Shi Star Chart is an astronomical book from the Warring States period, divided into two parts: the Gan Jing and the Shi Jing. It records the position chart of star changes and the laws of the five major planets of metal, wood, water, fire, and earth, reflecting the achievements of astronomy in the Warring States period.
